_about: Suit color definitions keyed by name. Reference one via themes.json 'suitStyleKey'.
_note: Keys starting with '_' are documentation and safely ignored by Gson. The 'groupName' field is also silently ignored during deserialization — only 'colorHex' is used by the SuitStyle record.

example._comment_groupName: Name of the court set (informational, not parsed) [String]
example._comment_colorHex: Display color for cards in this suit group (hex) [String]

example._comment_groupName: Wild card suit group (last entry is fallback for all unlisted suits)
example._comment_colorHex: Display color for wild card labels and fallback suit color (hex/rgba/named) [String]
